expectations.text: Output contains all 4 rounds (Round 1 through Round 4)
expectations.evidence: All 4 rounds present: Round 1 Visionary Proposes, Round 2 Skeptic Challenges, Round 3 Visionary Defends, Round 4 Pragmatist Decides

expectations.text: Visionary, Skeptic, and Pragmatist personas all appear and are distinct
expectations.evidence: Visionary argues for raising, Skeptic raises 7 challenges, Pragmatist decides modify-and-proceed with conditions

expectations.text: Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
expectations.evidence: All 7 challenges have severity: critical (2), significant (4), minor (1)

expectations.text: Round 3 contains at least one concession where the Visionary acknowledges a valid challenge
expectations.evidence: Multiple concessions including full concession on valuation (Challenge 2), partial concessions on need for money and opportunity cost

expectations.text: Round 4 contains one of the 4 valid verdicts
Debate metrics include a confidenceScore between 1-10
A review date is specified for revisiting the decision
Risks accepted section exists with specific risk references
expectations.evidence: Risks accepted section lists 3 specific risks: sales hiring execution risk (Challenge 4), culture change risk (Challenge 5), downside dilution asymmetry (Challenge 7)
